agent_outputs.raw: Defense wins. The empirical pre-analysis and four-period comparison provide the required justification for blocked random windows. The scope is correctly limited. VERDICT: defense_wins

The departure from chronological evaluation is justified by empirical evidence: near-zero residual autocorrelation at the 15-minute horizon and equivalent model rankings across four historical periods. The claim is limited to the short-horizon nightly-retrained regime where this holds. No methodological issue. VERDICT: defense_wins

Blocked random windows are valid here because the conditioned residual process is empirically near-i.i.d. at the target horizon, confirmed by residual analysis and cross-method evaluation comparison. Pre-specified design. Limited scope. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: Unanimous defense wins. The empirical pre-analysis providing residual near-independence and equivalence evidence is the load-bearing justification. ETD constraint enforced: defense wins.
all_issues_raised: non-chronological split — justified by empirical pre-analysis

empirical_test.condition: Reproduce pre-analysis showing near-zero residual autocorrelation at 15-minute horizon and equivalent model rankings under both evaluation methods
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Residual dependence substantial or rankings differ
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Near-zero dependence; equivalent rankings; pre-specification documented
